description: AWS Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (MSK) monitoring dashboard combining JMX Exporter metrics from MSK Open Monitoring with AWS CloudWatch metrics.
title: AWS MSK Cluster Monitoring

widgets.description: Number of active controllers in the cluster. Should always be exactly 1.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Active Controller Count

widgets.description: Number of partitions without an active leader. Any value above zero is critical.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Offline Partitions

widgets.description: Partitions where ISR count is less than the replication factor. Indicates replication lag.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND broker_id IN $broker_id

widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions

widgets.description: Partitions where ISR count has dropped below min.insync.replicas. Writes may be rejected.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Under Min ISR Partitions

widgets.description: Rate of messages being produced to topics across all brokers.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND topic IN $topic

widgets.title: Messages In Rate

widgets.description: Rate of bytes received by brokers from producers.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND topic IN $topic

widgets.title: Bytes In Rate

widgets.description: Rate of bytes sent by brokers to consumers.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND topic IN $topic

widgets.title: Bytes Out Rate

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.description: Number of log segments across brokers. High counts may indicate retention or compaction issues.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND broker_id IN $broker_id

widgets.title: Log Segment Count

widgets.description: Total log storage size per broker.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND broker_id IN $broker_id

widgets.title: Log Size by Broker

widgets.description: Consumer group lag per topic. High lag indicates consumers are falling behind.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND consumer_group IN $consumer_group

widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag

widgets.description: Rate of fetch requests from consumers to brokers.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND broker_id IN $broker_id

widgets.title: Fetch Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of produce requests from producers to brokers.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name AND broker_id IN $broker_id

widgets.title: Produce Request Rate

widgets.description: CPU utilization percentage from CloudWatch for MSK broker instances.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: CPU Utilization

widgets.description: Memory usage from CloudWatch. High memory can cause broker instability.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Disk utilization for MSK broker storage volumes.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Disk Usage

widgets.description: Network throughput from CloudWatch at the instance level.

filter.expression: deployment.environment IN $deployment.environment AND cluster_name IN $cluster_name AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Network In/Out
